basic_details.job_title: TNSRLM Madurai Community Bank Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 127 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Tamil Nadu State Rural Livelihoods Mission Madurai (TNSRLM Madurai)
basic_details.short_information: Tamil Nadu State Rural Livelihoods Mission Madurai (TNSRLM Madurai) Community Bank Coordinator Notification 2026 has been released in May 2026 on the official website of TNSRLM. A total of 127 vacancies have been announced through the TNSRLM Madurai Community Bank Coordinator Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: 12th Pass, SHG member with minimum 2 years as animator, Knowledge of Tamil and English reading, writing and arithmetic, Computer skills and two-wheeler driving license preferred
qualification.details: Must be a woman member of SHG under Panchayat level federation. Minimum 2 years experience as SHG animator. 12th pass. Knowledge of Tamil and English reading/writing and arithmetic. Computer skills and two-wheeler driving license preferred.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for TNSRLM Madurai Community Bank Coordinator Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 07-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TNSRLM Madurai Community Bank Coordinator posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Community Bank Coordinator posts is 07 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Community Bank Coordinator position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 127 vacancies for the Community Bank Coordinator post in TNSRLM Madurai.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed 12th grade and be a woman member of an SHG with at least 2 years of experience as an animator. Knowledge of Tamil and English, along with computer skills, is preferred.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Community Bank Coordinator role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Community Bank Coordinator position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 2500 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the TNSRLM Madurai Community Bank Coordinator posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category of candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What are the selection criteria for the Community Bank Coordinator posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test, Interview, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Does TNSRLM Madurai offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify any age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for more information.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates as per the instructions in the official notification.
